required_actions: Add REQ-34: C5 MUST version-stamp credibility update logic in OpinionSnapshot headers; VTD replay MUST use the logic version active when VTDs were originally processed (resolves OQ-4, priority P0)

Add REQ-35: C6 coherence graph Merkle root MUST use canonical leaf ordering within each shard (sorted by quantum ID) and digest computation MUST be atomic with respect to shard mutations within a tick (resolves pre-mortem T-02)
monitoring_flags: MF-1: Prior art search covers different C34 iteration. Section 13 comparison adequate but not formal.
MF-2: Part III implementation timeline — monitor whether Wave 4 delivers full causal traversal or Part III remains permanent stub.
MF-3: Recovery drill alarm fatigue — consider escalation thresholds (2 consecutive FAIL = mandatory remediation).
MF-4: 36,000s C6 consistent-cut gap — monitor operational impact during CONSOLIDATION_CYCLE.
MF-5: Pre-C7 UDP multicast reliability — validate HDL gossip fallback in deployment environments.
rationale: C34 fills a genuine, production-blocking gap in the AAS architecture. The specification is thorough (2,671 lines, full pseudocode, 33 conformance requirements). Consumer-side audit trail and semantic synchronization predicates with contract binding are novel contributions. Part III deferral is pragmatic. Always-on cost negligible (0.007%). Two required actions resolve unresolved OQ-4 and T-02 findings.
